17.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

17.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
17.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

17.gl: emptiness or vanity; figuratively, something transitory and unsatisfactory; often used as an adverb
17.dv: or (rarely in the abs.) הֲבֵל; from H1891 (הָבַל);

17.gl: properly, to lean forward, i.e. to peer into the distance; by implication, to observe, await
17.kj: behold, espy, look up (well), wait for, (keep the) watch(-man).

18.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
18.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
18.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

18.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)

18.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
18.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

18.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
18.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

18.gl: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
18.kj: (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make

18.gl: to lie alongside (i.e. in wait); by implication, to catch an animal (figuratively, men); to victual (for a journey)
18.dv: a primitive root; also denominative from H6718 (צַיִד)

19.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)

19.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
19.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

19.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
19.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

19.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
19.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).

19.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

19.kj: burning, chase, inflame, kindle, persecute(-or), pursue hotly.

20.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
20.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

20.gl: to live, whether literally or figuratively; causatively, to revive
20.kj: keep (leave, make) alive, [idiom] certainly, give (promise) life, (let, suffer to) live, nourish up, preserve (alive), quicken, recover, repair, restore (to life), revive, ([idiom]

20.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
20.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

20.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
20.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

20.gl: to catch (in a net, trap or pit); generally, to capture or occupy; also to choose (by lot); figuratively, to cohere
20.kj: [idiom] at all, catch (self), be frozen, be holden, stick together, take.

21.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
21.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge

21.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
21.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

21.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
21.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

21.gl: a cup (as a container), often figuratively, a lot (as if a potion); also some unclean bird, probably an owl (perhaps from the cup-like cavity of its eye)
21.dv: from an unused root meaning to hold together;

21.gl: to become tipsy; in a qualified sense, to satiate with astimulating drink or (figuratively) influence
21.kj: (be filled with) drink (abundantly), (be, make) drunk(-en), be merry. (Superlative of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

21.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
21.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

22.gl: to visit (with friendly or hostile intent); by analogy, to oversee, muster, charge, care for, miss, deposit, etc.
22.kj: appoint, [idiom] at all, avenge, bestow, (appoint to have the, give a) charge, commit, count, deliver to keep, be empty, enjoin, go see, hurt, do judgment, lack, lay up, look, make

22.gl: to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)
22.kj: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-ove

22.gl: to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal

22.gl: to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive
22.kj: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, [idiom] be all here, be (make) perfect, be spen

22.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
22.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

22.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
22.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).
